meta.title: Naked-eye star catalog (HYG v4.4 subset)
meta.source: HYG database v4.4 (astronexus/hyg, Codeberg), compiled from the Hipparcos, Yale Bright Star and Gliese catalogs. Positions, magnitudes, colours (B-V), spectral types and parallax distances are REAL MEASURED data (Hipparcos/Gaia era).
meta.attribution: Star data: HYG database v4.4 (c) astronexus / David Nash, CC BY-SA 4.0, compiled from Hipparcos, Yale Bright Star Catalog and Gliese. Derived subset shared under the same CC BY-SA 4.0.
meta.star_names_authority: Proper names follow the IAU Working Group on Star Names (WGSN) IAU Catalog of Star Names; carried in HYG's `proper` field and cross-checked against the live IAU-CSN.
meta.selection: All stars with apparent magnitude <= 6.5 (naked-eye limit) UNION all stars with a proper name UNION every star used by a constellation stick figure. The Sun (HYG id 0) is excluded.

units.id: int -- positive = Hipparcos (HIP) number; negative = -(HYG database id) for stars with no HIP
units.ra: degrees, J2000 (0..360); converted from HYG decimal-hours RA (x15)
units.ci: colour index B-V (null if absent) -> maps to star colour
units.dist_ly: distance in light-years (parsecs x 3.26156); null if HYG has no reliable parallax
units.spect: short spectral type (e.g. A0, K5, M2); null if absent
units.name: IAU/WGSN proper name; null if unnamed
units.bayer: Bayer designation abbrev (e.g. Alp); null if none
units.con: constellation abbreviation (e.g. CMa); null if none

meta.honesty: Positions/magnitudes/colours/distances/spectra are measured. RA->deg and pc->ly are the only unit conversions. Proper motion & precession are ignored for present-day display (sub-arcminute over decades). Nulls are never filled in. See docs/NIGHT_SKY_PHYSICS.md.
